body:
This PR
 - Moves the radiation cache and tendencies into src
 - Removes some closures over global constants
 - Removes `radiation_model_cache`'s dependence on NCDatasets
title: Move radiation tendencies into src

body:
This PR adds an `ode_compat_examples/` folder, with a copy of our `examples/` environment, with perf packages added to it.

Since we're using ClimaTimeSteppers for the vast majority of our jobs, we can split out the environments and, for most of our jobs, upgrade to the latest SciMLBase / DiffEqBase, which could help with invalidations and compile times (coming in followup PRs).

Perhaps a step towards #1019
title: Split out examples from ode compat examples env
